name: Kohl's Charge Card

welcome_offer.description: Get 40% off your first purchase at Kohl's within 30 days of credit approval — in store or online

earning_rates.notes: Earn 7.5% back in Kohl's Rewards on all Kohl's purchases
Earn 5% back in Kohl's Rewards without Kohl's Rewards membership

other_benefits: Monthly exclusive savings opportunities for cardholders

sources.notes: Forbes: Kohl's Credit Card from Capital One earns 7.5% rewards for Kohl's Rewards members
U.S. News: 40% discount on first purchase for new cardholders within 30 days
NerdWallet: variety of discounts available, good for frequent Kohl's shoppers

notes: Store card for Kohl's shoppers only. Earns 7.5% back at Kohl's for Rewards Members (5% otherwise). No annual fee. New cardholders get 40% off first purchase within 30 days. Card has no value outside Kohl's — cannot be used elsewhere. Anniversary discounts and monthly exclusive offers add value for frequent Kohl's shoppers. Issued as both a Mastercard (usable anywhere) and a store-only card. Not worth getting just for the discount unless you shop at Kohl's regularly.
